aiConsent.title: AI Data Sharing Consent
aiConsent.description: Planera uses AI to generate personalized travel itineraries, recommend sights, and power the Atlas travel assistant. To provide these features, some of your data is sent to a third-party AI service.
aiConsent.dataDates: Trip dates, arrival and departure times
aiConsent.dataInterests: Travel interests and local experience preferences
aiConsent.dataMessages: Messages you send to the Atlas travel assistant
aiConsent.notName: Your name, email, or account details
aiConsent.whyDescription: Your travel preferences are sent to OpenAI solely to generate personalized itineraries, recommend sights and attractions, and provide helpful travel advice through the Atlas assistant. OpenAI processes data according to their API data usage policy and does not use API data to train their models.
aiConsent.footnote: You can change this at any time in Settings → Travel Preferences.

tripMap.noLocationsFound: We couldn't find locations for these activities. The place names may be too specific or unavailable in our map database.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Planera respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the Planera mobile application and related services.
privacy.s1Text: Planera is an AI-powered travel planning platform that provides personalized travel itineraries and recommendations. Planera does not operate as a travel agency and does not process travel bookings directly.
privacy.s2_1Text: We may collect information you voluntarily provide, including:
privacy.s2_2Text: When you use the Service, we may automatically collect limited technical data such as crash logs and basic diagnostics to improve app stability and performance.
privacy.s2_3Text: Planera may receive limited data from third-party services (such as analytics, authentication, or payment providers), in accordance with their privacy policies.
privacy.s3b3: • Communicate with you (support, updates, important notices)
privacy.s3NoSell: We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.s4Title: 4. AI & Automated Processing — Third-Party AI Service
privacy.s4Text: Planera uses AI systems provided by OpenAI, Inc. (San Francisco, CA, USA) to generate personalized travel itineraries, recommend sights and attractions, and power the Atlas travel assistant.
privacy.s4_1Title: 4.1 What Data Is Sent to OpenAI
privacy.s4_1Text: When you use AI-powered features, the following data may be transmitted to OpenAI's API:
privacy.s4_1b2: • Trip dates, arrival time, and departure time
privacy.s4_1b3: • Budget amount and number of travelers
privacy.s4_1b4: • Travel interests and local experience preferences
privacy.s4_1b5: • Messages you send to the Atlas travel assistant
privacy.s4_2Title: 4.2 What Data Is NOT Sent to OpenAI
privacy.s4_2Text: We do not send the following personal data to OpenAI or any other third-party AI service:
privacy.s4_2b1: • Your name, email address, or account credentials
privacy.s4_3Text: Data is sent to OpenAI solely to generate AI-powered travel content. OpenAI processes data in accordance with their API data usage policy and does not use API inputs to train their models. AI outputs are automated and informational only — no automated decisions produce legal or similarly significant effects, and you remain in full control of your travel decisions.
privacy.s4_4Text: Before any data is sent to OpenAI, Planera will request your explicit consent. You may grant or withdraw this consent at any time via Settings → Travel Preferences. If you decline consent, AI-powered features (trip generation, sights recommendations, and Atlas chat) will be unavailable, but all other app features will continue to work normally.
privacy.s5Text: We may share your information only:
privacy.s5b1: • With OpenAI, Inc. — to provide AI-powered travel planning features (see Section 4 above)
privacy.s5b2: • With trusted service providers (hosting, analytics, email, payments)
privacy.s5b4: • To protect our rights, users, or the security of the Service
privacy.s5Text2: All third-party partners are required to handle data securely and lawfully. OpenAI's data processing is governed by their API data usage policy, which does not permit use of API data for model training.
privacy.s6p1: Planera may contain links to third-party websites or services (e.g. airlines, hotels, booking platforms).
privacy.s6p2: We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of third-party services. You should review their privacy policies before providing personal data.
privacy.s7Text: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to:
privacy.s7Text2: You may request deletion of your account and associated personal data by contacting us at privacy@planeraai.app.
privacy.s8p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data.
privacy.s8p2: However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s9Text: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the right to:
privacy.s9Text2: To exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@planeraai.app.
privacy.s10Text: Planera is not intended for users under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
privacy.s11Text: Your data may be processed or stored on servers located outside your country. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s12p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted within the Service.
privacy.s12p2: Continued use of Planera after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Privacy Policy.
privacy.s13Text: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or your data, contact us at:
privacy.footer: Planera – Your journey, planned with intelligence.

terms.title: Terms of Use (EULA)
terms.p1: These Terms constitute the Terms of Use (End User License Agreement – EULA) for the Planera mobile application.
terms.p2intro: Welcome to Planera. These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Planera mobile application, website, and related services (collectively, the "Service"). By accessing or using Planera, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.h1p1: Planera is an AI-powered travel planning platform that generates personalized travel itineraries and suggestions (including destinations, activities, flights, accommodations, and transportation options). Planera does not operate as a travel agency and does not sell, own, or control travel products or services.
terms.h1p2: All bookings, payments, and contractual relationships are made directly with third‑party providers (such as airlines, hotels, booking platforms, or experience providers).
terms.h2p1: You must be at least 18 years old to use Planera. By using the Service, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement and that you have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.
terms.h3p1: To access certain features, you may be required to create an account.
terms.h3b3: • Be fully responsible for all activity under your account
terms.h3p3: Planera reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.h4b1: • Use Planera for unlawful or fraudulent purposes
terms.h4b2: • Attempt to interfere with or disrupt the Service or its systems
terms.h4b3: • Copy, reverse‑engineer, or exploit the Service without authorization
terms.h4b4: • Use automated systems (bots, scrapers) without prior written permission
terms.h4p2: Planera may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time.
terms.h5p1: The itineraries, recommendations, prices, availability, and travel information provided by Planera are AI‑generated and informational only.
terms.h5b1: • Information may be incomplete, outdated, or inaccurate
terms.h5b2: • Prices and availability are not guaranteed
terms.h5b3: • Travel conditions, visa rules, safety regulations, and local laws may change
terms.h5b4: • Verifying all travel details before booking
terms.h5b5: • Ensuring compliance with visa, health, and entry requirements
terms.h6p1: Planera integrates or links to third‑party services. These services are governed by their own terms and privacy policies.
terms.h6b1: • Is not responsible for third‑party content, availability, pricing, or services
terms.h6b2: • Does not guarantee bookings, refunds, or customer support from third parties
terms.h6p3: Any disputes must be resolved directly with the relevant provider.
terms.h7p1: If Planera offers paid features or subscriptions:
terms.h7b1: • Fees will be clearly displayed before purchase
terms.h7b2: • Payments are processed via third‑party payment providers
terms.h7b3: • Subscriptions may renew automatically unless canceled
terms.h7p2: Refund policies (if any) will be stated at the point of purchase.
terms.h8p1: All content, branding, software, design, and AI outputs provided by Planera are the intellectual property of Planera or its licensors.
terms.h8p2: You are granted a limited, non‑exclusive, non‑transferable license to use the Service for personal, non‑commercial purposes.
terms.h8p3: You may not reproduce, distribute, or exploit Planera content without prior written consent.
terms.h9p1: If you submit content (such as reviews, feedback, or suggestions), you grant Planera a worldwide, royalty‑free license to use, display, and improve the Service based on that content.
terms.h9b1: • Does not violate any laws or third‑party rights
terms.h9b2: • Is not misleading, abusive, or defamatory
terms.h10p1: To the maximum extent permitted by law:
terms.h10p2: Planera shall not be liable for:
terms.h10b1: • Travel disruptions, cancellations, delays, or losses
terms.h10b2: • Injuries, damages, or expenses related to travel
terms.h10b3: • Errors or omissions in AI‑generated content
terms.h10b4: • Acts or omissions of third‑party providers
terms.h10p3: Use of the Service is at your own risk.
terms.h11p1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
terms.h11p2: Planera does not guarantee uninterrupted access, accuracy, or suitability for your specific travel needs.
terms.h12p1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Planera from any claims, damages, or expenses arising out of:
terms.h13p1: Planera may suspend or terminate your access at any time if you breach these Terms or misuse the Service.
terms.h13p2: Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.
terms.h14p1: Your use of Planera is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.
terms.h15p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Greece, without regard to conflict of law principles.
terms.h15p2: Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts.
terms.h16p1: Planera may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.h17p1: For questions or support, contact us at:
